allow: Bash(git --no-pager diff -- main.py config/settings.py src/analysis/claude_analyst.py src/analysis/sentiment.py)

PowerShell(try { $pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8050 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; "stopped dashboard PID $_" } } catch { "no listener on 8050 \(already stopped\)" })
